ECADUPSPCBReferenceDesignatorInfo: defines the Reference Designator to be used for the Printed Circuit Board in the Product Structure
ECADUPSECADFindNumberAttributeInfo: defines the Attribute in ECAD which is used to store the Find Number value
ECADUPSFindNumberModeInfo:
defines the Mode for the Find Number Support;You can turn the support for Find Number completely off, drive it from ECAD as the master or drive it from MCAD/3DEXPERIENCE. If driven from MCAD/3DEXPERIENCE, the Find Number will only transferred from ECAD if there is no existing value available in 3DEXPERIENCE.
In either way there will be no synchronization of the Find Number from 3DEXPERIENCE to ECAD. The Handling is only unidirectional from ECAD to 3DEXPERIENCE
ECADUPSPackageNamePropertyInfo: defines the name of the ECAD property of the Cadence Component which is used to derived the Package name during initial import
ECADUPSPackageDescriptionPropertyInfo: defines the name of the ECAD property of the Cadence Component which is used to derived the Package Description during initial import
ECADUPSUseClassificationInfo: defines if Library Classification or local categories should be used for electronic Components
ECADUPSElectronicLibraryInfo:
defines the Classification Library and Classes used for classifying the Electronic Components. Only Definition Libraries are supported, no Categorization Libraries.
You can use either the name of the classification library or class or the title and multiple Libraries can be separated by a semicolon.
Example:Library-1;Library-2/class-1/class-2
CadenceAllegroUPSOrCADECADCategoriesInfo: Component Categories to categorize CIS database tables and Symbol OLB in case of non-CIS usage
ECADUPSOrCADUseCISInfo: if enabled, OrCAD CIS license is used and required for managing electronic variants and electronic components through CIS database. If disabled, electronic variants are not used and electronic components are managed in standalone OLB
ECADClassificationPathDefinitionProperty: Defines the name of the OrCAD Parameter to store the classification path for import
CadenceAllegroUPSOrCADEnterpriseItemNumb: Enterprise Item Number Property in OrCAD
Defines the name of the OrCAD Parameter which holds the Enterprise Item Number
CadenceAllegroUPSCheckoutFolderNamingInf: Defines the naming Convention for the directory into which the data is opened. Can be Name, Title or Name_Title
ECADUPSSettingsResourceInfo: The Global Settings will be available to every Cadence user.
ECADUPSSettingsResourceUploadLabel: Upload a Global Settings Package file (.zip)
ECADUPSSettingsResourceCurrentLabel: Download the current Global Settings Package file
ECADUPSScriptsResourceInfo: The Manufacturing Scripts will be available to every Cadence user.
ECADUPSScriptsResourceUploadLabel: Upload a Manufacturing Scripts Package file (.zip)
ECADUPSScriptsResourceCurrentLabel: Download the current Manufacturing Scripts Package file
ECADUPSComponentDBResourceInfo: The Component Database Template will be available to every Cadence user and will be used after the local Component Library is reset
ECADUPSComponentDBResourceUploadLabel: Upload a Component Database template Package file (.zip)
ECADUPSComponentDBResourceCurrentLabel: Download the current Component Database template Package file
